items.title: UBS Maintains Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Buy Recommendation
J&J (JNJ) Earnings Growth Surges 70%—Reinforces Bullish Narratives on Profit Margin Strength
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) posted earnings growth of 70.2% for the most recent year, soaring past a solid 3.6% annual average over the last five years. The company’s net profit margin climbed to 27.3% from 16.8% a year ago, indicating a substantial boost in profitability. Although revenue is forecast to rise at 4.6% per year for the next three years, which is a slower pace than the US market’s expected 10%, JNJ continues to draw attention from investors for its resilient earnings quality and...

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, Goldman, AMD, Walmart, J&J, Navitas, Polaris, and More
items.description: JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, and Goldman Sachs post quarterly earnings that top Wall Street estimates.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Tuesday Recap: Walmart, J&J, AMD, Oracle
items.description: ↗️ Walmart (WMT): Shares of the retailer advanced 5% after it said it is forming a partnership with OpenAI to let shoppers buy its products directly within ChatGPT. ? Johnson & Johnson (JNJ): The healthcare giant said it planned to split off its orthopedics unit within two years and raised its annual sales outlook.

items.title: S&P Drug Titan J&J Announces Its Surprise Spinoff Plans
items.description: Johnson & Johnson said Tuesday it will spin off its orthopedics business into a new company called DePuy Synthes.
